# Standard SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test
# Standard PE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test

# Infolder SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test_infolder.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test
# Infolder PE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test_infolder.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test

# nogtrim = true: STAR, SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test_nogtrim.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test
# nogtrim = true: STAR, PE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test_nogtrim.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test

# nogtrim = true: bowtie2, SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test_nogtrim_bt2.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test && \
rm -r results && \
# nogtrim = true: bowtie2, PE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test_nogtrim_bt2.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test && \
rm -r results && \

# +dedup = true: bowtie2, SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test_dedup_bt2.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test && \
rm -r results && \
# .dedup = true: bowtie2, index provided, PE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test_dedup_bt2.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test && \
rm -r results
# +dedup = true: bowtie2, index provided, SE
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test_dedup_bt2_index.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test && \
rm -r results
# -dedup = true: bowtie2, PE

# Standard SE, STAR index provided
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file ...customcageq/testdata/tests/params_yeast_borlin_se_test.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test
# Standard PE, STAR index provided
time ~/tools/nextflow/nextflow run customcageq/main.nf -params-file ...customcageq/testdata/tests/params_danio_nepal_pe_test.yaml -profile singularity -w /mnt/scratch/slava/work_nepal_test
